snippet.title: BEN OLSAM HANGİ iPHONE ALIRDIM? ( iPhone 17 Pro Max, iPhone 13, iPhone 15, iPhone 16 )
snippet.description:
📱 Hangi iPhone kesinlikle alınır, hangisi artık alınmaz?
Bu videoda 2025 yılında iPhone satın almak isteyenler için güncel ve net bir rehber hazırladım. Eğer “Hangi iPhone alınmalı?” diye düşünüyorsan, bu video tam sana göre! 🚀

✅ Kesinlikle alınabilir iPhone modelleri:

iPhone 17 Pro Max

iPhone 17

iPhone 16 (256 GB)

iPhone 16 Pro Max

iPhone 15 (256 GB)

Videoda Ele Aldığım iPhone Modelleri:
🔹 iPhone 15 Pro Max – En üst seviye deneyim isteyenlere, titanyum tasarım ve güçlü A17 Pro işlemcisiyle!
🔹 iPhone 15 – Dynamic Island ve 48 MP kamera ile standart modeller arasında en iyisi!
🔹 iPhone 14 – Uygun fiyatlı, güçlü ve hala çok iyi bir seçenek!
🔹 iPhone 14 Pro Max – Büyük ekran ve uzun pil ömrüyle fiyat/performans canavarı!

iPhone 13 ve iPhone 11 hala çok popüler ama kısa zamanda yazılım desteği biteceğini düşünüyorum. Artık onların yerine daha güncel iPhone veya android telefonlar tercih edilmelidir diye düşünüyorum.

💡 Hangi iPhone'u almalısın? Senin için en uygun modeli belirlemek için videoyu sonuna kadar izlemeyi unutma!

iPhone 11, iPhone 12 veya iPhone 13 bence fiyat performans odağını kaybetti. O yüzden bu dönemde tercih etmem.

⚠️ Koşullu olarak alınabilecekler:

iPhone 14 Pro Max (ikinci elde uygun fiyat bulunursa)

iPhone 13 Pro Max (ikinci elde uygun fiyat bulunursa)

❌ Kesinlikle alınmaz:

iPhone 13 ve önceki seriler → artık çok eskidi

iPhone 15 Pro & 15 Pro Max → fiyat/performans dengesiz, yüksek fiyatına değmiyor

Bu videoda tüm detaylarıyla hangi iPhone’u neden alman gerektiğini, hangisinden uzak durman gerektiğini anlatıyorum. 💡

👉 Sen olsan hangi modeli tercih ederdin? Yorumlarda yazmayı unutma!

snippet.title: ESR Cyber Series iPhone 17 Case Review – 30 Drop Tests Prove Bigger Isn’t Better (7 of 50)
snippet.description:
Oversized corners, fake grip strips, and more bulk than any case I’ve tested so far — the ESR Cyber Series screams “tough.” But after 30 drops, the data says otherwise. This is one of those cases that’s all show, no substance.

I'm on a mission to find the best iPhone 17 Cases out there. I'm planning on reviewing 50 cases in order to figure out the Top 5. For the iPhone 17's, I've updated my scoring system to include accelerometer/gyro level drop test data to figure out which cases will actually protect your iPhone. 

Get your own ESR for iPhone 17 Pro Max Case with Stash Stand, 7X Military-Grade Drop Protection with Camera Control, Shock-Absorbing Phone Rugged Cover by using this link: https://mreh.ca/43qT5X6
*This is an Amazon affiliate link that will bring you to the right Amazon store for your location

#ReviewerNotInfluencer #Reviews #iPhone

In this video:
0:00 Intro
0:28 Design
1:09 Handling & Usability
2:16 Protection Features
3:06 Drop Protection
4:24 Should You Get It?

ESR for iPhone 17 Pro Max Case with Stash Stand, 7X Military-Grade Drop Protection with Camera Control, Shock-Absorbing Phone Rugged Cover Review

-Looks like a tough case
-Has substantial oversized corners
-also has the kickstand built in...remember in the previous case that we learned these aren't good protection wise?
-If you've been staring at cases for a while, you're probably thinking this is a Otterbox Commuter knockoff right?
-iPhone sits in a TPU sleeve, wrapped in a PC shell
-kind of a mix bag when it comes to grip
-TPU sleeve is grippier than the PC shell
-the edge of the shell does have a grip strip
-it looks grippy but physically isn't
-this is a beast of a case
-weights 79g, the avg. is around 45g
-and for bulk, will almost double the size of your iPhone (97%)
-so in my drop testing
-for corner drops, the iPhone logged 15.5G's
-that's 50% higher than average
-yikes

-for the rate of rotation after a drop, it was average
-but because of the giant air bags
-it took a long time for the case to settle
-46% worse than average

-the overall total force going into the iPhone? Was only worse by 6%
-so despite eating a giant initial hit, the case does a good job absorbing the rest of the impact

-for face drops
-the case didn't fail BUT
-the initial hit was 69% higher
-the TPU edges kept the iPhone bouncing
-and the overall force was 66% higher than the average case
-yikes

-for camera lump drops
-unlike the previous ESR case, the whole back is rigid
-BUT the initial impact was higher than average
-the settling rate was 30% worse
-and the total force going into the iPhone from the lump was 18% worse

-Soo....bigger has to be better right?
-For this case, no
-this case is all smoke and mirrors, looks tough but the iPhone takes a bit more punishment than the average iPhone case
-So with the bulk, it has to have lots of protective features right?
-the corners look massive BUT
-there are massive air pockets
-biggest in my collection of cases
-the corner is around 4.3mm thick
-the air pocket is only 1.9mm thick

-on the inside back of the case, there's some foam, 
-technically called InnerPORON?
-does it do anything in real drops? Keep watching

-for rigidity, despite having a PC back, the lack of a full PC edge
-it only took 12.7mm to bend it 8mm
-that's 57% worse than the average case
-that's a small red flag for me
-ESR added this hatching on the Magsafe rings
-doesn't add to functionality of Magsafe
-for magsafe, takes 11.5N to pull off a magsafe accessory, 12.6 N to push
-overall, it's 19% stronger than average
-buttons are built into the TPU edge
-feels squishy
-except for the camera control button, it floats
-the edges are tall, very noticeable when swiping
-port has cover 
-DOEST IT FIT BIG CABLES
-speaker grills are covered with a film of some sort
-DOES IT BLOCK SOUND?

snippet.title: JANGAN BELI DULU! REVIEW JUJUR KAMERA IPHONE 17 PRO, WORTH IT BUAT UPGRADE?
snippet.description:
iPhone 17 Pro hadir bukan cuma dengan desain premium, tapi juga sistem kamera yang makin canggih dan fleksibel buat segala situasi.

Buat spesifikasi kamera ponsel ini, Di bagian belakang, ada triple camera setup yang terdiri dari Lensa Utama 48MP, Telephoto 12MP dengan optical zoom hingga 8x, hingga ultra Wide 12MP

Sedangkan di bagian depan, ada kamera selfie 12MP. 

Selama seminggu, kami juga mencoba beberapa fitur menarik yang ada di ponsel ini.
Yang pertama, fitur Center Stage ini cocok buat kalian yang suka foto bareng-bareng sama teman kalian tanpa perlu repot-repot rotate ponsel ini.

Yang kedua, fitur Dual Capture, kita bisa rekam dua sisi sekaligus dari depan dan belakang — jadi cocok buat bikin konten reaksi atau vlog jalan-jalan serta konser nih.

Dan jangan lupa, kamera ini juga punya fitur optical zoom 8x optik + 40x digital zoom beneran bikin iPhone 17 Pro berasa kayak bawa lensa telefoto.
Secara keseluruhan, iPhone 17 Pro ngasih pengalaman yang powerful, smooth, dan kreatif banget selama minggu kami pakai ponsel ini.

snippet.title: Apple's Best iPhone For Most People In A Bit...
snippet.description:
Have a look at this.. If you navigate to Apple's website, the tagline for iPhone 17 is Magichromatic, which surely is not a word, but split in half means a magic system based on colors. There's no typical introduction video like they made for the Pro or the Air, and I think that's because this phone kind of sells itself.

The last time I remember this happening was for the iPhone 11. Two small improvements to the XR in the form of dual cameras and a $50 drop in price were enough to make it a no-brainer recommendation at the time. For context, at 159 million units sold between 2019 and 2022, it became the 10th best selling smartphone of all time… Yeah, I said all time, and all the company did was listen to its customers.

So what happens when Apple fixes almost every single shortcoming we've asked for since pretty much the following year with the iPhone 12? Well you get this. I'm Jaime Rivera and it's time for our iPhone 17 review, sponsored by TP-Link. Stick around to learn how its new Deco BE67 has helped me make the best out of this new iPhone.

Learn more about the TP-Link Deco BE67: https://amzn.to/4o6K65I
